creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 201024
update security/rubygem-net-ssh to 5.1.0

Attached patch (trivial) updates rubygem-net-ssh to 5.1.0, which is required for updating sysutils/vagrant. The update itself looks harmless enough, but I'm never really sure around the ruby stuff, so I pass this to people with better judgement :)
